changes.reason: Activate exactly one dormant VALID_0DTE pin-avoid concept as a router/profile discovery test while preserving the existing active profile order and all current production edges. This follows the strategist's profile-split thesis rather than another broad veto or take-profit adjustment.

Enable the dormant charm-wall pin-avoid profile only after adding it to the VALID_0DTE router. The goal is to sample whether existing C# playbook logic can route high pin-risk states away from charm_pin_pullback_long/charm_wall_breakaway_long tails without globally blocking protected extended-VWAP winners.

expected_effect: Expected to create a clean attribution sample for a dormant pin-avoid profile with minimal disruption to the current leader. Success requires positive standalone PnL or clear tail reduction, total net profit retained at >=98% of run_001, no increase in slow >=12h trades, and no material cannibalization of pullback_long, charm_pin_pullback_long, squeeze_long, or charm_wall_breakaway_long. Main tradeoff is that the new profile may be unreachable or may steal a few profitable charm/pin continuation entries.
label: charm-wall-pin-avoid-activation-probe
rationale: The leader remains strong, but repeated squeeze TP probes are now flat and take-profit is novelty-saturated. Direct 1DTE tightening, call-wall loosening, runtime exits, and pullback re-expansion have all hurt risk-adjusted score or profit. The remaining useful research path is profile discovery: all current bad-MAE rows are covered by extended-VWAP/pin-style diagnostics, yet protected extended-VWAP winners make blunt global veto tuning unsafe. Activating one dormant VALID_0DTE pin-avoid profile is a config-only split test that can show whether existing playbook routing separates pin-risk tails better than parent-profile tightening.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long produced 36 trades and $1324.4 PnL with median hold near 5 minutes, but owns a -527 MAE tail. Protected extended-VWAP winners have median MAE around -14.45, so a separate pin-avoid route is preferable to global extension blocking.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Pin Avoid Dormant Split
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The dormant profile may be unreachable, or router matching may cannibalize clean charm-pin/charm-wall winners instead of isolating tails.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE high charm-wall or pin-risk state currently routed into charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin worst MAE, while total net profit remains >=98% of run_001 and protected fast-winner count is not materially reduced.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: pullback_long remains the dominant PnL engine at $2299.7 but owns the current -638.75 worst MAE. Broad static structure filters would remove too much profitable flow and prior pullback re-expansion created catastrophic heat.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Companion Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Config-only proxies may block profitable weak-structure pullbacks; early-path and profile-aware features are likely needed to separate recoverable heat from traps.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback_long entry with weak structure distances, low or negative VWAP acceleration, no early MFE, and delayed recovery behavior.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Retain >=90% of pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE from -638.75 toward <= -527 and keeping total PnL/exposure hour flat or better.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The current regime is a strong long-only momentum/pullback tape with 105 trades, 100% realized win rate, no slow >=12h trades, and broad profitability across VALID_0DTE and VALI...

new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated dormant profile must produce positive standalone PnL, reduce combined charm/pin worst MAE, and retain >=95% of total leader PnL.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Delta Charm Breakout Sample Builder
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: At least 5 trades, positive standalone PnL, worst MAE better than -150, and no degradation of squeeze_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL/exposure.
